title: Wheel Odometry Dead-Reckoning and Kalman Heading Fusion
content: Dead-reckoning integrates wheel encoder deltas: Δx=Δs·cos(θ), Δy=Δs·sin(θ), Δθ=(ΔR-ΔL)/L where L is the wheelbase. Heading error accumulates approximately 0.5°/m driven by wheel slip and unequal radii. A 1D scalar Kalman filter fusing encoder Δθ (process) with IMU yaw (measurement) reduces heading drift by approximately 10× compared to encoder-only heading integration.
